name: Natural Turn (at a Corner)
preceding_figure_names: Closed Telemark, Cross Chasse, Fish Tail, Forward Lock, Four Quick Run, Heel Pivot (Quarter Turn To Left), Natural Pivot Turn, Natural Turn, Progressive Chasse, Running Finish, Running Right Turn, Six Quick Run, Tipple Chasse To Right, V6, Zig-Zag, Back Lock And Running Finish
following_figure_names: Closed Impetus (after 1-3), Tipple Chasse To Right (after 1-3), Natural Turn And Back Lock, Natural Pivot Turn, Natural Spin Turn, Natural Turn With Hesitation, Natural Turn, Cross Chasse (use 6th step of Natural Turn as entry), Forward Lock (and then Quick Open Reverse, after 1-5 of Natural Turn ending DC, ; or and then any Natural figures, after 1-5 of Natural Turn ending DW of new LOD, ), Zig-Zag, Back Lock And Running Finish (use 6th step of Natural Turn as entry), Tipsy To R (after 1-4 of Natural Turn), Rumba Cross
notes:
The step can be underturned to end Man facing new LOD, in which case, 1/4 turn should be completed between 4-5.
The heel pull can be underturned to face new LOD.

steps.action: RF forward, FDW, start turn R, sway, CBM, start rise
LF back, BDW, start turn R, sway, CBM, start rise, NFR
comments: Pay special attention not to tilt shoulder. Shoulder needs to maintain flat throughout. Head follows elbow.

steps.action: LF side, BDC, T, 1/4 to R between 1-2, sway, up
RF side, PLOD, T, 3/8 between 1-2, body turns less, sway left, up
RF closes to LF, BLOD, TH, 1/8 to R between 2-3, sway right, up, lower
LF back, BLOD, TH, continue turn R, sway, CBM
RF to side, small step (heel pull), FDW of new LOD, H, IE, WF, 3/8 between 4-5, sway
comments: The heel pull can be underturned to face new LOD.

steps.action: RF forward, FDW, H, --, sway, slight CBM
LF to side, back new LOD, TH, 1/4 between 4-5, sway
comments: Technically it's a side step. But in practice, it's often a fwd step, then turn.

steps.action: RF back, BDW, T, 1/8 between 5-6, sway, slight
comments: Collect RF first before stepping back. Big step.
